response.overview: Jacques has gathered a troupe of young men and women who travel through France in a double-decker bus, giving theatrical performances in the villages. But the audiences are as poor as the plays themselves. Soon the money runs out. A patron is needed. The eccentric Baron Prisemote appears just in time. He is delighted by the young people and invites them all to his castle. In return for his generosity, however, he expects the troupe to rehearse and perform a play he has written.
response.title: Love Theater
